title: chrysothamnus junceus
intro: Chrysothamnus junceus, also known as rabbit brush, is a flowering shrub native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus junceus include its ability to reduce allergies, soothe digestive issues, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Chrysothamnus junceus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
